\tzpentry{ID5736}{Quantum Gyromagnetic Lagrangian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5736 introduces Quantum Gyromagnetic Lagrangian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{L}_{coupling} = \frac{g \mu_B}{\hbar}\mathbf{L}_{gyro} \cdot \boldsymbol{\mu}_{eff} \end{equation}
